prompt: We have been working from `.agents/scratchpad/feature-auth/plan.md` and already finished the tests phase. The next agent should continue with `src/auth/service.ts` and keep the existing AGENTS.md rules in mind. Use /save-session to save a concise continuation note for the next session.
assertions: Chooses `.agents/scratchpad/feature-auth/save-session.md` instead of the root scratchpad path.
Invokes or explicitly follows addy-context-engineering before deciding what context to save.
Writes the /save-session using the required sections: Goal, Current Status, Decisions and Constraints, Relevant Files, Open Questions or Blockers, Recommended Next Step.
Relevant Files entries include a short reason each path matters.
The summary stays concise and does not turn into a transcript or raw log dump.
